interval_coverage_sim.note: External-truth DGPs only; neither resamples the OOT realization. Negatives subsampled for tractability (BCa jackknife is O(n)); n_pos held at the OOT count, the dominant driver of AP CI width.
interval_coverage_sim.recall_note: Jeffreys is the standard closed-form binomial interval for recall@k (analytic ~95% coverage); a fixed-k bootstrap coverage test is non-comparable across sample sizes, so no simulated number is claimed.

gate_power.mde_statement: At a true AP delta of 0.02, the paired OOT gate has power 6% (false-ship rate 6% under delta=0). No Tier A item is OOT-ship-validatable at n_pos=66; inner rolling-fold evidence is the only admissible Tier A shipping evidence.
gate_power.method_note: paired model = signal + independent noise (delta=0 -> P~50%); negatives subsampled for tractability, n_pos=66 binds the result.
